name: Apple Pie
illustration: A warm slice of apple pie with a lattice crust and cinnamon-spiced filling.

name: Cherry Tart
illustration: A delicate tart shell filled with glossy cherry compote and fresh cream.

name: Lemon Meringue Pie
illustration: A bright lemon curd pie crowned with toasted meringue peaks, golden and slightly blistered at the tips.

name: Banana Cream Pie
illustration: A buttery pie crust cradling layers of sliced banana and vanilla cream, topped with pillowy whipped cream.

name: Blueberry Pie
illustration: A rustic pie with a crumbled golden crust, bursting with deep violet blueberry filling and a hint of lemon zest.

name: Strawberry Tart
illustration: A crisp pastry shell filled with smooth vanilla cream and topped with glazed strawberry halves arranged like tiny jewels.

name: Honey Butter Tart
illustration: A petite tart with a flaky golden shell and a gooey honey-butter filling, caramelized at the edges.

name: Chocolate Ganache Tart
illustration: A sleek dark chocolate ganache tart with a mirror-smooth top and a crisp, crumbly cocoa crust.

name: Caramel Apple Tart
illustration: Thinly sliced apples fanned across a golden tart shell, drizzled with warm caramel and a pat of melted butter.

name: Matcha Custard Tart
illustration: A pale green matcha custard nestled in a delicate tart shell, dusted with matcha powder in a gentle swirl pattern.

name: Lavender Honey Pie
illustration: A dreamy pie with a floral lavender-infused honey filling, topped with a soft cloud of whipped cream and dried lavender buds.

name: Cinnamon Pear Galette
illustration: A free-form rustic galette with caramelized cinnamon-sugar filling, its edges folded over in a charmingly imperfect way.

name: Egg Custard Pie
illustration: A classic custard pie with a silky, jiggly egg filling speckled with vanilla and a perfectly golden crust.
